verses.text: Topa in Moses kiangah
“Amaute in miphakte, ninneite leh misi tawh kisukha-in a ninte khempeuh giahphual pua-ah a omsakna dingun Israel mite thu pia in
A laizangah keima omna ahi amau' giahphual a nitsak lohna dingun hih bangin a nin numei leh pasal paikhia sakin, giahphual pua-ah na omsak ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua mah bangin Israel mite in hih uh a, giahphual pua-ah amaute hawlkhia uh hi. Topa in Moses tungah a gen bangin Israel mite in hih uh hi.
Topa in Moses kiangah
“Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Topa' tungah mite a khialh theihna ahi khialhna khat peuhpeuh, numei ahi a, pasal ahi zongin gamta-in a mawh leh
a gamtatnasa a khialhna pulak ding hi. Amah in a tatkhialhna-ah a kicingin dinkik ding a, tua tungah nga-ah khat behlapin, a khialhna mi tungah pia ding hi

Ahih hangin a khialhna mi in tua khialhna hanga ditkikna a sang ding tanau a neih kei leh, a khial mi-a' dingin kilemna a bawlsakna ahi kilemna tuutal banah, khialhna hanga tua ditkikna pen siampipa-a' dingin Topa' tungah tung ding hi
Amaute in siampipa tungah a paipih uh biakna peuhmah, Israel mite' na a siangthote khempeuh, ama-a' hi ding hi
Mi khempeuh' na a siangthote zong ama-a' hi ding a, mi khatpeuh in siampipa tungah a piak peuhmah ama-a' hi ding hi,” a ci hi.
Topa in Moses kiangah
“Israel mite kiangah hih bangin gen in: Mi khatpeuh' zi vakvai-in a pasal a palhngulh a
pasal khat in tuanu luppihin, a pasal in tua thu a theih kei a, tuanu kininsak napi-in kuamah in phawkloin, a khialh laitakin tuanu kimanlo ahih manin a langah a pang ding teci a omloh hangin
a pasal in upmawhna lungsim nei-in, a kininsak tawm a zi a upmawh leh; tua ahih kei leh zong, a numei kininsaklo napi-in, a pasal in upmawhna lungsim nei-in, a zi a upmawh leh

tuapa in siampipa kiangah a zi paipihin, tuanu-a' dingin a kisam biakna, mangbuhham lawh khat paipih ding hi. A tungah sathau sungloin, paknamtui zong koihlo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen upmawhna hanga an tawh biakna, mawhna phawkkikna dinga an tawh biakna ahi hi
“Siampipa in tuanu va paipihin, Topa' mai-ah koih ding hi
Siampipa in lei beel khatin tui siangtho la ding a, biakbuk sual tunga om leivui tawmkhat la-in tua tui sungah khah ding hi

Siampipa in Topa' mai-ah tua numei koih ding a, numei' sam phelin, upmawhna hanga an tawh biakna ahi phawkkikna an tawh biakna tua numei tawisak ding hi. Siampipa in ama khutsungah tuisia tawi ding hi
Tua ciangin siampipa in amah kiciam sakin, ‘Na pasal' ukna nuai-ah na om sungin, kuamah in nang hong luppih loin, nitna lamah a kihello na hih leh, hih tuisia panin suakta in
Ahih hangin na pasal' ukna nuai-ah om napi-in nangmah vakvai a, nang leh nang kininsakin, na pasal a hilo midang khat in nang hong luppih leh
(siampipa in tua numei kiciamsak ding a, tuanu kiangah) Topa in na pheipi teemsakin na pumpi a pawmsak ciangin, na mite lakah hamsia leh kiciamna-a zat dingin Topa in nang hong bawlin
hih tuisia in na gilsung zui hen la, na pumpi pawmsakin na pheipi teemsak hen,’ ci ding hi. Tua ciangin numei in, ‘Amen, Amen,’ ci ding hi
“Tua ciangin siampipa in laibu khat sungah hih hamsiate gelhin tuisia sungah silkhia ding hi
Tua numei a nasak velval thei ding tuisia a dawnsak
siampipa in numei' khutsung panin upmawhna hanga an tawh biakna lakhia ding a, Topa' mai-ah tua an vei-in biakna tau-ah paipih ding hi
Siampipa in phawkna dingin an tawh biakna khutdim khat la-in biakna tau tungah hal ding a, tua khit ciangin a tui pen a numei dawnsak ding hi

Amah in a tui a dawnsak khit ciangin, tuanu amahmah kininsakin a pasal tungah thuman loin gamta ahih leh, tua tuisia pen ama sungah tumin nasak velval ding a, a pumpi pawmin a pheipi teem ding a, tua numei pen mite lakah hamsiatna-in kizang ding hi
Ahih hangin amahmah a kininsak hiloin a siang ahih leh, tuanu suakta-in ta nei thei ding hi
“Zi khat, a pasal' ukna nuai-ah om napi-in vakvai-in amahmah a kinitsak ciang

ahih kei leh pasal khat in upmawhna lungsim nei-in a zi a upmawh ciangin, upmawhna thute-ah zat ding ngeina tu-a bang ahi hi. Siampipa in Topa' mai-ah numei koih ding a, hih ngeina khempeuh numei' tungah zang ding hi
Hih thu-ah pasal in mawhsakna thuaklo ding a, ahih hangin numei a mawh leh ama mawhna thuak ding hi,” a ci hi.
